# Whoza.ai

> AI voice agents answer your trade business calls 24/7, built in Scotland for UK plumbers, electricians and builders. Plans from £59/month. 7-day free trial.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://whoza.ai/) — AI call answering for UK tradespeople
- [How It Works](https://whoza.ai/how-it-works) — 30-minute setup, keep your number
- [Pricing](https://whoza.ai/pricing) — Plans from £59/month, no contract
- [FAQ](https://whoza.ai/faq) — Common questions answered
- [Support](https://whoza.ai/support) — Help centre and contact
- [Blog](https://whoza.ai/blog) — Trade business growth guides
- [Contact](https://whoza.ai/contact) — Get in touch
- [Trust & Compliance](https://whoza.ai/trust) — Security and certifications

## Service Areas

### Emergency Trades (24/7 Critical)
- [Plumbers](https://whoza.ai/for-plumbers) — Burst pipes, boiler breakdowns
- [Electricians](https://whoza.ai/for-electricians) — Emergency callouts
- [Gas Engineers](https://whoza.ai/for-gas-engineers) — Carbon monoxide, gas leaks
- [Locksmiths](https://whoza.ai/for-locksmiths) — Lockouts, break-ins
- [Heating Engineers](https://whoza.ai/for-heating-engineers) — No heating/hot water
- [Drainage](https://whoza.ai/for-drainage) — Floods, sewage backups

### Planned Trades
- [Builders](https://whoza.ai/for-builders) — Extensions, renovations
- [Roofers](https://whoza.ai/for-roofers) — Repairs, replacements
- [Carpenters](https://whoza.ai/for-carpenters) — Bespoke furniture, kitchens
- [Joiners](https://whoza.ai/for-joiners) — Staircases, bespoke joinery
- [Plasterers](https://whoza.ai/for-plasterers) — Skimming, rendering
- [Tilers](https://whoza.ai/for-tilers) — Bathrooms, kitchens, floors
- [Painters & Decorators](https://whoza.ai/for-painters-decorators) — Interior, exterior
- [Landscapers](https://whoza.ai/for-landscapers) — Design, maintenance, patios
- [Cleaners](https://whoza.ai/for-cleaners) — Domestic, commercial
- [Handymen](https://whoza.ai/for-handymen) — General repairs
- [Pest Control](https://whoza.ai/for-pest-control) — Rodents, insects
